title: Expose HTTP endpoints GET /patterns and POST /patterns/:id/approve
completion_summary: HTTP endpoints wired: GET /patterns returns JSON array of candidate patterns (empty array when nil store), POST /patterns/{id}/approve sets status to approved and returns updated manifest, GET /healthz. httpapi package matches observer pattern (Config/Server struct, New/ListenAndServe/Shutdown, writeError). 6 tests pass: empty list, list with data, approve, approve 404, healthz, nil store.
acceptance_criteria: `GET /patterns` returns JSON list of candidate patterns
